mcq:
She _____ to school every day.
a) go b) goes c) going d) went

By next year, I _____ my studies.
a) finish b) will finish c) will have finished d) finished
tf: Present simple is used for habits and facts. [True/False]
Past continuous shows an action completed in the past. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence in present perfect continuous
Change to passive: They built this bridge in 2010

mcq:
'I am busy,' he said. → He said that he _____ busy.
a) am b) was c) is d) were

'Where do you live?' → She asked me where I _____ .
a) live b) lived c) am living d) was living
tf: In reported speech, we usually change the tense one step back. [True/False]
We use 'that' in reported yes/no questions. [True/False]
short: Report: 'I can speak French,' she said
Change to reported question: 'Do you like music?' he asked

mcq:
You _____ wear a helmet when riding a motorbike.
a) can b) must c) might d) would

If I had money, I _____ a new laptop.
a) will buy b) would buy c) bought d) buy
tf: Type 2 conditional refers to real future situations. [True/False]
short: Give advice using 'should' for a student who is always late

mcq:
Artificial Intelligence helps us _____ problems faster.
a) create b) solve c) forget d) hide

A device that stores data is called a:
a) monitor b) keyboard c) hard disk d) printer
tf: Technology has no effect on education. [True/False]
short: What are the dangers of spending too much time online?
long: Write about how technology changed our lives

mcq:
The letter _____ yesterday.
a) write b) wrote c) was written d) is written

English _____ all over the world.
a) speaks b) is spoken c) was spoken d) has spoken
tf: The passive of 'She has finished the work' is 'The work has been finished by her'. [True/False]
We use 'by' to mention the agent in passive sentences. [True/False]
short: Change to passive: They will open a new hospital next month
Rewrite in active: The house was built by my grandfather

mcq:
The man _____ lives next door is a doctor.
a) who b) which c) where d) when

This is the book _____ I borrowed from the library.
a) who b) which c) where d) when
tf: Defining relative clauses give essential information. [True/False]
We can use 'that' for both people and things in defining clauses. [True/False]
short: Combine: The girl is my sister. She is wearing a blue dress
Add a non-defining relative clause: My teacher Mr. Ali _____ helped me

mcq:
We use 'however' to show:
a) addition b) contrast c) cause d) time

Which word means 'because'?:
a) although b) since c) but d) and
tf: An essay should have an introduction, body, and conclusion. [True/False]
We use linking words to make writing less organized. [True/False]
short: Write 3 linking words for giving examples
Complete: I like reading, _____ I don't have much time
long: Write a short essay about the importance of learning English

mcq:
Global warming is caused by an increase in:
a) Oxygen b) Carbon dioxide c) Nitrogen d) Hydrogen

Deforestation leads to:
a) More rain b) Soil erosion c) Clean air d) More forests
tf: Recycling helps reduce waste and pollution. [True/False]
Climate change only affects poor countries. [True/False]
short: What can governments do to protect the environment?
long: Write about how individuals can help solve environmental problems
